nasb.text: ‘But if his offering is from the flock, of the sheep or of the goats, for a burnt offering, he shall offer it a male without defect.

esv.text: “If his gift for a burnt offering is from the flock, from the sheep or goats, he shall bring a male without blemish,

cnv.text: “人的供物若是獻羊作燔祭，不論是綿羊或是山羊，總要獻一隻沒有殘疾的公羊。

ccb.text: “如果用绵羊或山羊作燔祭，必须用毫无残疾的公羊。
